pr_text:
## Title: Fix incorrect type cast in PRS TOA calculation

### Summary
The PRS (Positioning Reference Signal) time-of-arrival (TOA) calculation in `nr_prs_channel_estimation` was performing division on `prs_toa` without proper type casting. Since `prs_toa` is an integer type, the division operation was subject to integer arithmetic rules, causing precision loss before the result was stored in the floating-point field `dl_toa`. This led to inaccurate TOA measurements that could degrade positioning
